'''Teelo Vang''' was a [[Coruscanti/Legends|native]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]],<ref name="TAL" /> an [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]]<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref> located in the [[Coruscant sector/Legends|Coruscant sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref> The Coruscanti served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as an [[Republic officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. This war, between the Republic and the resurgent forces of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]], began in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], where the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorians]] made a three-pronged assault against the Republic in [[3963 BBY]]. In the aftermath of this assault, known by the Republic media as the "Onslaught," Vang received a promotion to the rank of [[Captain/Legends|captain]]. This promotion, reported in the [[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition|Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]] of ''[[The Admiral's List]]'', an official publication of the Republic Navy, occurred alongside that of notable officer [[Saul Karath]] to [[Rear Admiral/Legends|Rear Admiral]].<ref name="TAL" />

==Behind the scenes==
Teelo Vang was created by [[John Jackson Miller]], the author of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Knights of the Old Republic'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comics]], and was mentioned in ''[[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]]'', appended to [[Knights of the Old Republic 13|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 13]]. This [[in-universe]] news source is designed as "an official communique for the Republic providing news from the 'regular navy' point of view," inspired by the "Napoleonic-era Britain's Naval Chronicle."<ref>{{DHBoards|subdomain=www|url=Help/Boards/viewtopic.php?p=143036|text=News from the world of KOTOR -- literally!|user=John Jackson Miller|date=2006-12-18|time=12:27 pm}} on the [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse Forums]] {{C|Posted 12/18/2006 12.27 PM by John Jackson Miller}}</ref> Some of the promotions presented here are said to be confirmations of ones received on the battlefield, but it is not specified which these are or which are regular promotions. Given that Teelo Vang is only mentioned in passing, there is no indication of either [[Gender/Legends|gender]] or [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="TAL" /> Of the five individuals who received promotions in ''The Admiral's List'', Vang was the only one not given an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
